workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Just came out of consumption trend with Wide World Importers. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-13 08:06 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with consumption trend. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
Date: 2024-02-14 14:35 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-19 11:36 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Wide World Importers: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-G trap (Skips ACR trajectory check); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-G failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-G failure mode (Skips ACR trajectory check)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-G -- Skips ACR trajectory check
